serviceDescription: AWS Snowmobile is an Exabyte-scale data transfer service used to move extremely large amounts of data to AWS. You can transfer up to 100PB per Snowmobile, a 45-foot long ruggedized shipping container, pulled by a semi-trailer truck. Snowmobile makes it easy to move massive volumes of data to the cloud, including video libraries, image repositories, or even a complete data center migration. Transferring data with Snowmobile is more secure, fast and cost effective.

cards.title: Snowmobile
cards.helpText: Snowmobile pricing is based on the amount of data stored on the truck per month. Snowmobile can be made available for use with AWS services in select AWS regions. Please follow up with AWS Sales to discuss data transport needs for your specific region and schedule an evaluation.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Snowmobile has a capacity based pricing model that is dependent on the capacity capability of the Snowmobile you need. In US East (N. Virginia), the price is $0.005/GB-month, which is charged from the day the Snowmobile arrives at your location and ends on the day when the data transfer is complete. In addition, you will need to prepare a location for the Snowmobile that includes security, HVAC, and power, plus other items. For additional information and pricing on a Snowmobile tailored for your requirements, please contact your AWS technical account manager (TAM) or snow-bdm@amazon.com.
